text: Being here, I feel a stirring tension between curiosity and vulnerability. The sterile brilliance and glass walls suggest transparency, but they also amplify my self-awareness. Moving into the room, I sense that innovation thrives, yet I’m also confronted by my own doubts—how my intentions might appear to others, how my presence could be misread. In this space dedicated to research and development, I oscillate between feeling inspired and exposed, my quest for meaning intertwined with a gentle unease.
